2026-04-08T17:38:33.6117391Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-08T17:38:33.6119852Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.

2026-04-08T17:38:33.6121372Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-08T17:38:33.6124285Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-08T17:38:33.6125026Z 
2026-04-08T17:38:33.6131296Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-08T17:38:33.6131972Z
